message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 244 migrate 4 more storage read sites cx-first (events + fts + mutes) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Additional storage-read surface migration. 4 sites:

1. L26118 ft events list query:
   `storage.get_events_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
2. L31149 event actions listing:
   `storage.get_events_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
3. L22672 ft fts verify:
   `storage.get_indexing_health_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
4. L31579 ft mute list:
   `storage.list_active_mutes_with_cx(&storage_cx, now)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern with
locally-scoped `storage_cx` bindings.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Cumulative main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 244: **95 sites**.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
